---
title: "Shravanthi's Academic Homepage"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg # Optional: Add a profile photo to your folder
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/shravanthimuralidhar
---

Welcome to my personal homepage! Below you will find the interactive slides and materials for our class presentations.

## Presenting Today

-   [📊 Click Here to Open My Presentation Slides](./presentation/index.html)

## Course Materials

-   [📝 View My Project Notes](./notes.html)
